scopeReview.command: Checked automation memory, AGENT.md, docs/agent-feedback.md, docs/user/design-harness-workflow.md, docs/agent-rules.json, docs/project-context.json, .agents manifest/contracts/guard files, package scripts, git status, and recent commits.
scopeReview.summary: Automation memory existed and matched the current blocked state. No commits landed after 8d6460d9b9a2ad78e9bcec991d3e06dfbb5961a9 as of 2026-06-27; recent candidates remain product UI/DnD details or already-covered harness adjustments, not new reusable Agent-process failures.

harnessValidate.summary: Harness structure, project rules, documentation line limits, and purity checks passed for this automation sync plus narrow verification unblock.

verificationUnblock.summary: Reproduced the prefer-const blocker from the latest tactics DnD work and fixed it with a one-line const change.

verifyAlias.summary: Blocked in projectVerify: lint and typecheck passed, but Vitest failed in tests/frontend-auth-and-schedule-ui.test.tsx.

frontendTestReproduction.summary: Reproduced the same 10 failures again on 2026-06-27 through the full guard in the existing frontend auth/schedule UI test file; failures concern product UI copy/classes/attendance expectations outside this automation scope.

issuesObserved: No new commits landed after the previous automation memory entry as of 2026-06-27; HEAD remains 8d6460d9b9a2ad78e9bcec991d3e06dfbb5961a9.
The latest completed product work ended at 8d6460d9b9a2ad78e9bcec991d3e06dfbb5961a9 and showed implementation/styling iteration, not a new reusable Agent-process failure.
Final verification reproduced one narrow prefer-const lint blocker in src/components/features/TacticsDragBuilder.tsx; it was fixed as a verification unblock, not promoted into harness policy.
The existing frontend auth/schedule UI test blocker was reproduced again on 2026-06-27 and remains outside the automation scope.
missedEvidence: npm run harness:guard:verify did not pass because tests/frontend-auth-and-schedule-ui.test.tsx has 10 reproducible failures unrelated to AGENT.md/Harness policy sync.
retrospective.reason: Candidate issues were already addressed by existing harness guidance or were project-local implementation details. The only required action was project-context synchronization for the automation run.

blockers: npm run harness:guard:verify is blocked by 10 reproducible failures in tests/frontend-auth-and-schedule-ui.test.tsx after lint/typecheck pass.
